description: Letter of appeal in the name of an old woman, whose mantle was stolen while she was about to wash it in the Nile, asking the community in a well-styled address to help her to buy at least a large shawl. She emphasizes her age and frailty and eye disease as the reason why she cannot help herself. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 170, 500.) ASE.
tags: illness: halik, Women's letters, Illness, Petition, communal, illness: eye, charity, Illness: women's, illness: du'f, illness: poverty, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: פנייה בשם אשה זקנה שגלימתה נגנבה בעת שהיתה על סף כביסתה בנילוס, המבקשת מהקהילה לסייע לה לרכוש לפחות שאל גדול, ומדגישה זקנותה, חולשתה ומחלת עיניה.
